description: Log in to the Aerobridge admin panel (http://localhost:8000/admin/) as 'admin' with password 'adminpass123'. Configure the permissions for the user 'coordinator' to include exactly the following: registry | aircraft | Can view aircraft; registry | flight plan | Can add flight plan; registry | flight plan | Can change flight plan; registry | flight plan | Can view flight plan; registry | flight operation | Can add flight operation; registry | flight operation | Can change flight operation; registry | flight operation | Can view flight operation; and registry | person | Can view person. Do not assign any other permissions or add the user to any groups.
